items.briefing:
Partnered Health has confirmed a cyber incident affecting patient information across its national clinic network — if you or anyone you know has used their services, be alert for suspicious contact claiming to be from the company. Separately, Asia-Pacific businesses are being warned about hidden risks from staff using AI tools at work without proper oversight, including accidental sharing of sensitive data.

Security researchers have also flagged a Windows vulnerability that can blind security software, making threats harder to detect. With cyber risks touching every profession, it's a timely reminder that cybersecurity is everyone's responsibility — not just IT's.

**Tip:** If you use AI tools at work, avoid entering confidential client or organisational information into them unless your employer has approved the tool.

featured.title: Partnered Health confirms cyber incident affecting patient information across national clinic network
featured.quote: Healthcare data breach at national clinic network directly impacts patient privacy across Australia.
